title: University Orientation Programs
content:
University Orientation Programs

Üsküdar University welcomes new students with Orientation Programs

What is the University Orientation Program?

These are programs prepared to share information about the functioning of the university, units operating outside the academy, campuses and areas that students can benefit from before the start of the course programs. Orientation programs aim to provide information about the academic, social and cultural opportunities of the university and to help students quickly adapt to the school before the course program.

Üsküdar University prepares new students for university and campus life

Üsküdar University informs new students about the entire functioning and work of the university with the orientation program prepared with the participation of academic and administrative staff.

In the videos prepared within the scope of Corporate Communication, Student Affairs, Information Technologies, Health Culture and Sports, Library Documentation, Career Center and International Relations Departments, the managers of each unit share brief information about the issues that students are curious about.

The orientation program, prepared to help new students quickly adapt to university life and campus culture, includes information about the areas that students can benefit from outside the courses, application points, clubs, sports and social facilities, laboratories, libraries, the functioning of administrative units and how students can get support from these units.
